questionHtml:
2.67 g of lead (II) carbonate is decomposed by heating until constant mass.

PbCO3 (s) → PbO (s) + CO2 (g)

What is the final mass of solid?

A.  0.44 g

B.  2.23 g

C.  2.67 g

D.  3.11 g

meta.title: 2.67 g of lead (II) carbonate is decomposed by heating until constant mass. PbCO3 (s) → PbO (s) + CO2 (g) What is the final mass of solid? A. 0.44 g B. 2.23 g C. 2.67 g D. 3.11 g
